The '''tranthebar mountain ripper''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of bird of prey that possessed a wingspan of over five [[Meter/Legends|meters]], and was native to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tranthellix]]. Captured beasts were trained by local [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] or used in illegal races throughout the Core, with racers strapped beneath them. They were often smuggled offworld.<ref name="GFT" />
